topStories.title: "Expressed Deep Concern": PM Modi Discusses Middle East Situation With Iran President
topStories.description: Iran War Latest News: "Expressed Deep Concern": PM Narendra Modi Discusses Middle East Situation With Iran President

topStories.title: Iran Says Only Non-Aggressor Nations Will Get Safe Passage Through Hormuz Strait
topStories.description: Tehran denies laying mines in the strategic waterway and warns nations backing US-Israel action may not get safe passage.

topStories.title: Smoke Rises From Roof, Shooter Active After Truck Crashes Into US Synagogue
topStories.description: Police are responding to reports of an "active shooter" at a synagogue outside Detroit, where smoke is billowing from the roof.

topStories.title: Two in critical condition after shooting at Old Dominion University in US
topStories.description: Authorities say suspect is dead after opening fire in university building in latest shooting on US university campus.

topStories.title: Iran's Big Warning To Trump: Won't Leave You Until You Admit Mistake And Pay The Price
topStories.description: Top Iranian security official Ali Larijani stated that conflicts cannot be ended with 'a few tweets' as tensions escalate with the US.

topStories.title: Congress urges government to hold an all‑party meeting on women’s quota law
topStories.description: The government had reached out to at least two parties — the Congress and the Samajwadi Party — seeking their opinion on advancing the timeline for implementing the legislation

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Trump administration considers waiving Jones Act; here's all you need to know about it
topStories.description: The Trump administration is considering a temporary waiver of the Jones Act to keep energy and agricultural shipments moving between US ports amid supply disruptions linked to the Iran conflict. The move aims to ease rising fuel prices by allowing foreign ships to transport goods domestically.

topStories.title: Trump says not ‘appropriate’ for Iran to participate in the World Cup in US
topStories.description: US president, who won the FIFA Peace Prize says Iran would be welcome but should not come for its players' safety.

topStories.title: Iran's Historic Palaces, UNESCO Sites Damaged In US-Israeli Bombing
topStories.description: US and Israeli strikes on Iran have damaged four cultural and historical sites, including palaces and an ancient mosque.

topStories.title: Supreme Court to look into what constitutes ‘personal data’ in DPDP laws
topStories.description: The DPDP laws in effect legalise disproportionate state surveillance, create a compensation vacuum for citizens, dilute the Right to Information, erode the ability of journalists to practice their profession, the petition said

dailyNews.description: Rules in favour of children of senior PSU officials selected as OBC candidates in civil service exams; creamy layer exclusion framework says income from salaries, farm land cannot be included for wealth test

dailyNews.title: West Asia crisis: IGL assures uninterrupted PNG, CNG supply amid LPG shortage concerns
dailyNews.description: IGL's assurance has come amid global energy market disruptions caused by the escalating conflict in the Middle East involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

dailyNews.title: US Shooting: Two Injured, Gunman Dead At OD University Of Norfolk - What We Know So Far
dailyNews.description: The matter is now being investigated by the police and the identity of the shooter is being ascertained.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court allows withdrawal of plea to bring back Netaji's mortal remains from Tokyo temple
dailyNews.description: The court said it would prefer to have Netaji’s sole heir and daughter, Anita Bose Pfaff, approach it with the prayer directly

dailyNews.title: Heart-wrenching video shows Iranian mother comforting child during bombing: 'Don’t be scared...'
dailyNews.description: A video circulating online shows an Iranian mother comforting her child as explosions echo nearby during reported US-Israeli airstrikes. The emotional clip has drawn widespread attention on social media, highlighting the human cost of the escalating conflict.

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans plan vote on SAVE America Act despite low chances of passage amid Democratic opposition
dailyNews.description: Republicans must decide whether to continue pressing the voting bill or shift focus to economic policies aimed at winning over voters.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s president sets terms to end the war: Is an off-ramp in sight?
dailyNews.description: Iran is asking for 'reparations' and a guarantee that the US and Israel will not attack in the future.

dailyNews.title: US military ‘not ready’ to escort oil ships through Hormuz, official says
dailyNews.description: Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei says strait should remain closed as Donald Trump claims US benefits from high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Trump on rising oil prices: ‘US makes money when oil prices go up, but stopping Iran’s nuclear ambitions top priority’
dailyNews.description: Meanwhile, Bloomberg has reported that the Trump administration is set to suspend Jones Act to tame oil prices.

dailyNews.title: To protest or not to protest: Iranians face Hamlet's dilemma as Islamic Republic warns of strict action amid conflict
dailyNews.description: As war with Israel and the US intensifies, many Iranians face a dilemma: protest or stay silent. Officials warn of severe punishment for demonstrations, while exiled prince Reza Pahlavi urges resistance. Rights groups say past protests saw thousands killed.

dailyNews.title: Video shows moment Iran strikes US-owned oil tanker near Iraq
dailyNews.description: Iran has released video it says shows the moment one of its explosive-laden boats struck a US-owned oil tanker in Iraq.

dailyNews.title: Kelly Clarkson says 'American Idol' producers 'lied' about $1M prize
dailyNews.description: Kelly Clarkson accused "American Idol" of lying about her $1 million prize for winning the competition, claiming she never received the promised money or car.

topStories.title: Trump tries to calm concerns over gas prices as Iran's supreme leader threatens Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: President Trump is addressing concerns among investors and Americans over the rising prices of oil and gas. This comes as Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, issues his first public statement since taking over the regime. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs Jones Act waiver amid rising fuel prices, White House says
dailyNews.description: Easing the century-old shipping law could help lower fuel prices as the Iran war pushes crude oil near $100 a barrel, experts say.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Tour of States Is About More Than the Midterms
dailyNews.description: Beyond talking about the economy and voters’ hardships, the president is showing that he still has control over the Republican Party.

dailyNews.title: Trump Endorses Jake Paul, Who Isn't Running for Office
dailyNews.description: The president called Mr. Paul, a boxer and provocative influencer, a “great guy” and predicted that he would run for an elected position.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump launches the next phase of his trade wars with new investigations of key partners
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration will launch a wave of tariff-related investigations against 16 U.S. trade partners, the next phase in a sweeping global trade war

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iranian World Cup team away from U.S. for 'their own life and safety'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump suggested Thursday that he cannot guarantee the security of Iran's soccer team if it travels to the United States to compete in the World Cup later this year."The Iran National Soccer Team is welcome to The World Cup, but I really don’t believe it is appropriate that they be there, for their own life and safety," he wrote on Truth Social.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine awaits White House sign-off on US drone production deal
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says he is awaiting White House approval for a major drone production agreement proposed by Kyiv last year

dailyNews.title: Trump tariffs: Martin Heinrich bill would give families tax rebate for higher import costs
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Housing affordability bill clears Senate as investor ban creates headaches
dailyNews.description: The Senate passed the bill 89-10, but House lawmakers say more changes are needed before it could go to President Donald Trump's desk.
